title: Boat Owner membership is enforced at accept-time, not send-time
statement: Boat Owner membership (boat_management product grant) is required at the moment the invitee accepts a co-owner invite, not when the invite is sent. The check fires in the cast_vote service when the invitee voter approves; the boats.py invite endpoint accepts the invite without checking the recipient is eligible, surfacing only that they will need to upgrade to accept.

claims_code.where: approvals.py:93-103 — invitee approving a boat_coowner_invite without boat_management product grant raises 400 with upgrade hint
boats.py:829-831 (comment: 'Eligibility (Boat Owner membership) is enforced when the invitee accepts, not when the invite is sent') — endpoint deliberately does NOT block on recipient ineligibility

source: commit 4c7de14 'feat(coowner): enforce Boat Owner membership at invite-accept, not invite-send'
